title: AIO_InW Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function AIO_InW (Channel As Integer) As Integer
parameters:
Channel	Specify the channel number of the analog
		 I/O.
description: Reads analog value from optional analog I/O input channel.
see_also:
AIO_In, AIO_Out, AIO_OutW

AIO_InW Example

VB
examples:
Dim val As Integer
val = m_spel.AIO_InW(2)
